hero.title: Aréal
hero.subtitle: Contemporary Cuisine
hero.description: A gastronomic experience built on origin, precision, and balance

aside.text: We offers contemporary cuisine that combines refinement, transparency, and sustainability through a menù that showcases selected ingredients and precise techniques.

origin.title: Origin
origin.text: Every dish starts from a traceable and seasonal ingredient. Not just provenance, but context: climate, soil, processing. Ingredients are sourced from small agricultural and fishing operations working on quality and sustainability.

precision.title: Precision
precision.text: Technique is not a show, but a tool. Delicate cooking, clean reductions, light fermentations, and measured marinades define a recognizable style: clear, rigorous, uncluttered.

balance.title: Balance
balance.text: Each composition is built on a few gestures, calibrated between acidity, sweetness, saltiness, and texture. The goal is to offer a readable yet profound taste, without superfluous noise.

review1.text: Clean, precise cuisine with no excess. Minimalist-looking dishes with intense flavor. Impeccable service.
review1.author: Marco T.

review2.text: Perfect balance. The tasting menu conveys a clear philosophy. A calm, carefully curated atmosphere.
review2.author: Elena S.

review3.text: A restaurant that works with restraint. Nothing is out of place: carefully selected ingredients and technique that is evident but never intrusive.
review3.author: Andrea P.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: "Aréal" was born as a contemporary cuisine project inspired by the concept of essential territory: few elements, rigorously chosen, treated with techniques that respect their structure and identity.

space.title: The Space
space.text: The restaurant is located in a bright, linear architectural space, designed around natural materials — light stone, wood, and brushed steel — with a deliberately quiet dining room, built to place the dish at the center of the experience.

approach.title: Gastronomic Approach
approach.text: Our gastronomic approach is based on three pillars:

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: A selection of dishes designed to enhance Italian flavors.

cauliflower.name: Roasted Cauliflower, Almond Cream, Pine Oil
cauliflower.description: Selection of local products with homemade preserves.

amberjack.name: Citrus-Marinated Amberjack, Fermented Cucumber & Dill
amberjack.description: Classic seasoning, organic egg yolk and crispy cold cuts.

egg.name: Soft Egg, Jerusalem Artichoke & Toasted Mushroom Broth
egg.description: Potato cream, smoked ricotta and rosemary oil.

risotto.name: Risotto with Candied Lemon & Wild Thyme
risotto.description: Clarified butter, black truffle and aged Parmigiano Reggiano.

tortello.name: Goat Cheese Tortello, Wild Herbs & Hazelnut Butter
tortello.description: Carnaroli rice, meat broth and saffron reduction.

spaghetti.name: Herb Spaghetti, Light Colatura & Fermented Chili
spaghetti.description: Clams, mussels, squid and cherry tomatoes.

turbot.name: Steamed Turbot, Champagne Sauce & Crispy Fennel
turbot.description: Red wine reduction, roasted potatoes and seasonal vegetables.

duck.name: Duck Breast, Pomegranate Reduction & Roasted Carrot
duck.description: Citrus fruits, fennel and Taggiasca olives.

celeriac.name: Salt-Crusted Celeriac, Parmesan Foam & Walnuts
celeriac.description: Traditional recipe with tomato, olives and capers.

chocolate.name: Dark Chocolate Mousse, Delicate EVOO & Cervia Salt

pear.name: Pear Cooked in Light Honey, Vanilla Cream & Dried Flowers

wines.title: Wine Selection
wines.description: Wine list with Italian and international labels, available by the glass and bottle.

offers.title: Essence Tasting Journey
offers.text: A five-course itinerary that reflects our seasonal cuisine, crafted with precision and balance.
offers.text2: A guided selection of curated wines, paired with small bites designed to enhance their character.
offers.text3: A welcome glass, a reserved table selection, and a dessert created exclusively for the occasion.
